race.comment: STREETCAR FURY (1) comes here off a break of five months and has been readied with a trio of sharp hitouts. Is a noted fresh performer, filling a minor spot when returning from a spell last time in work over 1000m at Morphettville Parks. Expect him to play a major role. REFRESHING (10) has mixed her form so far this prep. Was safely held at Oakbank last time when struggling to get going, following a win there at her previous outing. Finds a suitable race and can rediscover winning form. AZTEC DANCER (6) drifted well back last start before storming home to get the verdict at Balaklava. Form this track is hard to knock with three wins from seven starts. If the early tempo is genuine, she is every chance to reel them in again. MERCURY EIGHT (2) has been freshened up since he disappointed last start, finishing ninth over 1000m at Morphettville Parks in better company. Will appreciate the drop in class. Sure to be thereabouts.
